mapper.sql: id, action, actor_user_id, target_type, target_id, scope, reason, request_json, result, summary_json, trace_id, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into ops_governance_audit( id, action, actor_user_id, target_type, target_id, scope, reason, request_json, result, summary_json, trace_id, created_at ) values( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{action}, #{actorUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{scope}, #{reason}, #{requestJson}, #{result}, #{summaryJson}, #{traceId}, #{createdAt} )
